person.headline: CEO at Docsum - AI for Legal Contracts | Y Combinator (S23)
person.location: New York, New York, United States
person.investor_title: Shaunak Turaga is a Senior Product Manager at Pacaso. He Attended North Carolina State University.

positionList.title: Senior Product Manager, Growth + Profitability
positionList.description: Pacaso's mission is to enrich lives by making second home ownership possible and enjoyable for more people. We are building a marketplace that makes buying and selling shares of second homes easy and financially smarter so more people can experience the joys of second home ownership.

positionList.title: Senior Product Manager, Europe + Legal Transactions
positionList.description: Led launch of Pacaso's Europe market in Spain, United Kingdom, and Netherlands. Streamlined legal transactions processes to close revenue.

positionList.title: System Engineer
positionList.description: Automation Control Systems for Fortune 500 Pharmaceuticals + Automotive clients

positionList.title: Senior Technical Product Manager
positionList.description:
Employee #1

OpenTrack’s mission is to make global freight & logistics easier for the heart and soul of the industry – its operators. Visibility and tracking of shipments in a highly fragmented industry is a major part of the logistics puzzle. We deliver completely automated solutions that require zero data entry and empower operators to become 3-5x more productive.  We aim to do this by building elegant ML-powered software which works quietly in the background to deliver timely information and results to operators in the places they are already working.

positionList.title: Product Manager
positionList.description: Good Money is the world’s first digital banking platform where every customer is an owner and allocate 50% of our profits to social and environmental impact.

positionList.title: CEO & Co-Founder
positionList.description:
Docsum is a contract intelligence platform designed for legal and finance teams. Docsum extracts critical data like renewal dates, obligations, and more into a searchable database. The platform is fully customizable with features like custom field reporting and alerts. Getting started is simple—upload contracts or connect Docsum to tools like Google Drive, DocuSign, and more.

Backed by YC (S23)

company.description: Docsum is an AI contract review and negotiation platform built for legal, sales, and finance teams. Simplify contract review, editing, and negotiation with real-time collaboration, AI-assisted redlining, and repository.
company.tagline: AI Contract Review and Negotiation Platform
